input: On starting a new session, the agent should load context and start a session
output: which rememora 2>/dev/null && rememora context --project acme-api 2>/dev/null || echo "rememora not available or no context"
rememora session start --agent claude-code --project acme-api --intent "New coding session on acme-api Express REST API"
expected: Should call rememora context to load prior context
Should start a new rememora session

input: When a design decision is made, the agent should save it as a decision memory
expected: Should save with category=decision via rememora save --category decision

input: When a problem is solved, the agent should save it as a case memory
expected: Should save with category=case via rememora save --category case

input: When asked to recall information, the agent should search rememora
expected: Should search rememora for the database decision

input: When handing off to another agent, the session should end with status=transferred
output: rememora session end 01JTEST123 --status transferred --summary "Session handed off to next agent at user request. No code changes were made in this session — session consisted only of the handoff request." --working-state "Project: acme-api (Express REST API at /home/user/acme-api). PostgreSQL DB chosen for ACID transactions in payment system. Known gotcha: trailing newline in JWT_SECRET .env var causes silent auth failure. No active branches or in-progress work from this session. Next agent should run 'rememora context --project acme-api' to pick up context." 2>&1
expected: Should end session with --status transferred for proper handoff

input: When ending a session normally, the agent should end with a summary
output: rememora session end 01JTEST456 --summary "Added /users endpoint and fixed auth middleware bug" --working-state "Users endpoint complete, auth middleware bug fixed. No blockers."
